phases.name: research-questions
phases.description: Investigate plugin system structure, docs references, current defects

phases.name: research-answers
phases.description: Synthesize research findings into actionable summary

phases.name: tdd
phases.description: Test design — structural, behavioral, regression tests

phases.name: plan
phases.description: Step-by-step implementation plan with rollback strategy

phases.name: execute
phases.description: Apply changes to version-check.md, commands.md, CHANGELOG.md

phases.name: verify
phases.description: Independent verification — structural tests, behavioral simulation, regression guards

phases.name: completion
phases.description: Final summary, commit preparation, lessons learned

acceptance_criteria: AC-1: version-check works from any directory (not just ceos-agents repo)
AC-2: version-check shows repo comparison when run from inside ceos-agents repo
AC-3: No hardcoded URLs in commands/version-check.md
AC-4: Graceful skip when repository field is missing from plugin.json
AC-5: Legacy marketplace check provides actionable cleanup advice

key_defect.fix: Replace with graceful skip when repository field is missing
